summary: Completed full backend + frontend testing of Scène Pulse (French single-user concert/residency planner). All 8 pytest backend tests passed (health, artists CRUD, venues CRUD, events CRUD with type filter + validation 422, file upload PNG+PDF via Emergent Object Storage, file download with correct Content-Type, file info, stats shape). Frontend UI flows verified end-to-end: Dashboard loads with stats bar + 4 tabs, artist/venue/concert/residence creation via dialog forms all persist and render, Events tab filters out residences correctly, Résidences tab locks event-type dropdown to 'residence', Calendar page at /calendrier is Monday-first, prev/next/today navigation works, residence spanning July 1-5 correctly appears on ALL 5 days with blue résidence color, clicking a day opens sidebar listing the event.

issues: Console warning: 'Missing Description or aria-describedby for DialogContent' — accessibility a11y nit, not user-visible. Consider adding <DialogDescription> or aria-describedby to DialogContent components.

action_items: (Optional/nit) Add DialogDescription or aria-describedby to Radix DialogContent in ArtistsTab, VenuesTab, EventForm dialogs to silence the a11y console warning.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py blocking I/O: put_object/get_object use `requests` (sync) inside async FastAPI handlers. This blocks the event loop during upload/download. Recommend switching to httpx.AsyncClient or aiohttp, or wrapping in asyncio.to_thread. Not blocking for single-user personal use but noteworthy.
server.py init_storage() is not thread-safe (global variable set without lock). OK for single-worker uvicorn, but would race under multi-worker.
server.py uses deprecated FastAPI @app.on_event('startup'/'shutdown') — should migrate to lifespan context managers (FastAPI >= 0.95).
No backend test for file size >25MB rejection (413); covered implicitly.
Event model validates type via Literal — 422 confirmed working.
Frontend Dashboard.jsx is clean; tabs correctly gated; stats bar re-fetches after mutation via refreshKey. Good.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed artists/venues/events/residence during testing. No residual data left in DB.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest file at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py covers health, CRUD, upload(PNG+PDF), download, info, stats, 422 validation. Use `pytest /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py -v` to rerun. Frontend data-testids confirmed: tab-events/residences/artists/venues, new-artist-btn, new-venue-btn, new-event-btn, new-residence-btn, artist-name/save, venue-name/save, event-title/type/start/end/save, cal-prev/next/today, cal-day-YYYY-MM-DD, nav-dashboard/nav-calendar. Note: event-start is type='date' (yyyy-mm-dd), NOT datetime-local. Calendar is Monday-first (LUN…DIM).
